html:
Exclusive to:

The Thatch Pack is a Backpack from the Shipwrecked DLC used to expand the player's Inventory. It has only 4 inventory slots, however it does not need to be prototyped and can be crafted from the start. It requires 4 Palm Leaves to craft and is flammable. It's capacity is less than that of the backpack, and thus is it not a useful item long-term, but it can be very useful to craft early-game if the player cannot find any gold nuggets on the first island or two they explore.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Willow wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wendy wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • WX-78 wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Woodie wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wes wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Maxwell wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Webber wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Walani wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Warly wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wilbur wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wilba wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wormwood wearing a Thatch Pack.
  • Wheeler wearing a Thatch Pack.

–Wilba
“Keeps stuff”
–Wormwood
“You can never have enough storage space.”
–Wheeler
The Thatch Pack is a Backpack from the Shipwrecked DLC used to expand the player's Inventory. It has only 4 inventory slots, however it does not need to be prototyped and can be crafted from the start. It requires 4 Palm Leaves to craft and is flammable. It's capacity is less than that of the backpack, and thus is it not a useful item long-term, but it can be very useful to craft early-game if the player cannot find any gold nuggets on the first island or two they explore.

The '''Thatch Pack''' is a [[:Category:Backpacks|Backpack]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC used to expand the player's [[Inventory]]. It has only 4 inventory slots, however it does not need to be prototyped and can be crafted from the start. It requires 4 [[Palm Leaf|Palm Leaves]] to craft and is flammable. It's capacity is less than that of the backpack, and thus is it not a useful item long-term, but it can be very useful to craft early-game if the player cannot find any [[Gold Nugget|gold nuggets]] on the first island or two they explore.
